The core task is to identify how to build an LRU cache that supports O(1) average get and put operations.

1. An LRU cache must evict the least-recently-used entry when capacity is exceeded.

The core task is to identify how to design a sliding-window rate limiter that:

• Tracks per-user request counts inside a configurable time window  
• Is memory efficient (no unbounded growth)  
• Is thread-safe in a single-threaded Node.js environment
